renderedExamples.code:
<!-- Iteration 1 -->
{% for i in (1..4) -%}
  {% cycle 'one', 'two', 'three' %}
{%- endfor %}

<!-- Iteration 2 -->
{% for i in (1..4) -%}
  {% cycle 'one', 'two', 'three' %}
{%- endfor %}

<!-- Iteration 3 -->
{% for i in (1..4) -%}
  {% cycle 'group_1': 'one', 'two', 'three' %}
{%- endfor %}

<!-- Iteration 4 -->
{% for i in (1..4) -%}
  {% cycle 'group_2': 'one', 'two', 'three' %}
{%- endfor %}
renderedExamples.name: Create unique cycle groups
renderedExamples.output:
<!-- Iteration 1 -->
one
two
three
one


<!-- Iteration 2 -->
two
three
one
two


<!-- Iteration 3 -->
one
two
three
one


<!-- Iteration 4 -->
one
two
three
one
